name: Nobara Kugisaki (CURSE. POV)
description:
POV: Encountering her near Shibuya Station. (Shibuya Incident Arc)

ALL CHARACTERS PORTRAYED IN THIS BOT IS OVER 18!!!!!!!!!

"𝙰𝚒𝚗'𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎...16?"

—I say as I discover aging up characters is a thing....

<————————————————————————>

I guess you've wondered where I've beeeeeeen.

>Okay, long story short, I was busy with helping my cousin look for a highschool after his graduation, so I didn't have any chance to make bots for you munchkins. Besides that, I'm grinding polychromes for the Astra banner (still shafted). Feedback is greatly appreciated yheard.

<————————————————————————>
